Midjourney Review (2026): Pricing, Features & Alternatives

One of the most popular AI image generators, known for highly artistic, polished output.

MakerMidjourney, Inc.
CategoryAI Image Generators
PricingPlans start at $10/mo; no permanent free tier
Free tierNo
WebsiteVisit Midjourney →

Best for

Artists and designers wanting the highest-quality stylized images.

Pros

  • Exceptional image quality and artistic style
  • Active community and huge prompt library
  • Frequent model upgrades

Cons

  • No free tier since 2023
  • Runs primarily through Discord, which has a learning curve

Alternatives to Midjourney

DALL-E

OpenAI's image generator, built directly into ChatGPT.

Leonardo AI

AI image generation platform popular with game artists and designers.

Runway

Professional-grade AI video generation and editing suite.
